steps.title: Order the past events
steps.content: Misaka served in World War II from 1941 to 1945, then joined the New York Knicks for the 1947-48 season. The blank must show that the service was completed before another past event.

steps.title: Use past perfect tense
steps.content: Choice A is simple past, choice B wrongly suggests ongoing service, and choice C uses present tense. The past perfect form "had already served" correctly places one completed past action before the later past action of joining the Knicks. The answer is D.
